name: Chicken a La Sabra
recipeIngredient: 8 Green olives, blanched in boiling water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken parts, orange juice, wine, zest, salt, paprika, and pepper in a large glass bowl. Let marinate in the fridge for 2 hours.
2. Lift the chicken out of the marinade and pat dry. Reserve the chicken and marinade separately.
3. Heat olive oil over medium-high heat in a deep heavy skillet or shallow pan large enough to hold the chicken in one layer.
4. Brown the chicken on all sides and transfer it to a plate.
5. In the same pan, cook onion over low heat until it starts to change color.
6. Pour in the marinade and simmer gently for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Return the chicken to the pan and simmer, partially covered, basting with pan juices and turning the pieces very low heat for about 35 minutes, or until the chicken juices run clear when pierced with a sharp knife.
8. Transfer the chicken to a warm serving platter and keep warm. Skim off excess fat.
9. Add olives to the pan and boil rapidly over high heat until glossy and starting to thicken.
10. Pour over the chicken and sprinkle with mint or dill for garnish. SERVES: 4-6
